rationale: Israeli military expansion in Lebanon and Syria adds minor regional tension relevant to Black Sea security; Romanian government formation remains the dominant domestic concern.

top_events.title: Romanian government formation — ongoing
top_events.summary: Liberal PM nominee still awaiting confidence vote; political uncertainty continues to affect Romania's domestic policy direction and EU fund access.

top_events.title: Israel expands military control in Gaza, Lebanon and Syria by 1,000sq km
top_events.summary: Israeli military expansion in the broader Middle East region adds background tension but no direct impact on Romania's Black Sea security or daily life.

top_events.title: Trump says Israeli attacks on Beirut unjustified, puts Iran deal at risk
top_events.summary: Rhetoric around Iran deal stalling could affect energy prices indirectly for Romania, but no confirmed policy change yet.
